channel.title: Comments on: Southern Star: Buried Hatchet Stout, Ep. 127
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Cookies & Cans : Southern Star Buried Hatchet Revisited « The Bake and Brew
item.dc:creator: Cookies & Cans : Southern Star Buried Hatchet Revisited « The Bake and Brew
item.description: [...] Beer America TV (video review – appearance by Scooter from Texas Brews, and a couple interesting facts about canned beer & “aluminum taste”) [...]
item.content:encoded: […] Beer America TV (video review – appearance by Scooter from Texas Brews, and a couple interesting facts about canned beer & “aluminum taste”) […]

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Sounds like a malty greatness stout! Too bad it so south of me but I have it on the list.
Thanks for the show guys!
item.content:encoded:
Sounds like a malty greatness stout! Too bad it so south of me but I have it on the list.

Thanks for the show guys!

item.description: [...] This post was mentioned on Twitter by Beer America TV, Scooter Hendon. Scooter Hendon said: Hey look at me, I'm gettin' small-time famous for beer talkin' http://beeramerica.tv/southern-star-buried-hatchet-stout/ [...]
